name: hbrain
description: Agent-native second brain. Capture notes, tasks, decisions, facts, and saved links as plain markdown files you own. Render Linear-style HTML views via the bundled `brain` CLI. Includes slash commands (/hbrain:timeline, /hbrain:tasks, /hbrain:capture, /hbrain:doctor, /hbrain:setup) and a SessionStart hook that auto-detects your vault and agent identity every turn.
